testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManagerTest

testcase.name: save and restore checkpoint round-trips correctly
multiple checkpoints for same workflow are independent
listCheckpoints returns all checkpoints for a workflow

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:06.379 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 09:05:06.379 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 09:05:06.380 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 09:05:06.384 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 09:05:06.384 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (2 task results) 09:05:06.385 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 09:05:06.385 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-2 (0 task results) 09:05:06.386 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 09:05:06.387 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 09:05:06.387 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 09:05:06.387 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-3 for workflow wf-2 (0 task results)
